zh.lifeSummary: 當Hierom Adam於1535年出生在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯時，他的父親John Adams25歲，母親Elizabeth Adams24歲。他於1560年之前與Elizabeth Platt在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1583年4月9日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hierom Adam于1535年出生在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯时，他的父亲John Adams25岁，母亲Elizabeth Adams24岁。他于1560年之前与Elizabeth Platt在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1583年4月9日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Hierom Adam was born in 1535, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Adams, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Adams, was 24. He married Elizabeth Platt before 1560, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 April 1583, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hierom Adam est né en 1535, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Adams, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Adams, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Platt avant 1560, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1583, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hierom Adam 1535 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Adams 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Adams 24. Er hat vor 1560 in Hertfordshire, England Elizabeth Platt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1583 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hierom Adam è nato il nel 1535 nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Adams, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Adams, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Platt prima del 1560, nel Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1583, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hierom Adamが1535年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John Adamsは25歳，母Elizabeth Adamsは24歳であった。1560年以前にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Plattと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1583年4月9日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hierom Adam(이)가 1535년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Adams(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1560년 이전 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Platt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1583년 4월 9일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hierom Adam nasceu em 1535, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Adams, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Adams, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Platt antes 1560, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1583, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Great Burstead, Essex, England: Great Burstead, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hierom Adam родился в 1535 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Adams, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Platt перед 1560 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 апреля 1583 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Platt antes de 1560, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1583, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
